response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all mandatory for this role. Their experience is heavily focused on web, mobile, and full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript, with no embedded firmware or switch product background.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Proven ability to work with low-level systems (e.g., DLang, real-time apps)
concerns: No C programming experience in UNIX/embedded context as required
Zero mention of Japanese language proficiency or exposure to embedded networking security
No experience with LAN-switch products, Linux kernel modification, or embedded device control

key_factors.factor: Absence of security networking domain knowledge
